items.title: Trade, Iran and Taiwan on the agenda as Trump arrives in China for high-stakes talks with Xi
items.summary: The US president says his first request to Xi would be to  "open up" China, while Beijing is expected to press Trump on the status of Taiwan.

items.title: Court overturns Alex Murdaugh's murder convictions and orders new trial
items.summary: The court has ordered a new trial over the June 2021 killings of Paul and Maggie Murdaugh.

items.title: Dozens of dogs rescued and suspect arrested in Uganda after BBC investigation
items.summary: A BBC investigation exposed how scammers posted social content of dogs in distress to dupe donors into giving money.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil
Still haven't filed your taxes? Here's what you need to know
items.summary: So far this tax season, the IRS has received more than 90 million income tax returns for 2022.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: Some on-air claims about Dominion Voting Systems were false, Fox News acknowledges in statement after deal is announced

Here are the 20 specific Fox broadcasts and tweets Dominion says were defamatory
items.summary: • Fox-Dominion trial delay 'is not unusual,' judge says • Fox News' defamation battle isn't stopping Trump's election lies

items.title: 美國防部長隨行訪中 「川習會」料觸及軍事溝通與核武議題
items.summary: 美國戰爭部（國防部）部長赫格塞斯（Pete Hegseth），13日隨同總統川普出訪中國，成為數十年來首位陪同現任總統，對中國進行國是訪問的美國防長。中國專家預期，北京將安排...…

items.title: 歐盟不明令禁止性傾向扭轉治療 但推動成員國實施
items.summary: 歐洲聯盟（EU）今天表示，其將不會下令禁止對同性戀、雙性戀、跨性別和酷兒（LGBTQ）族群的「性傾向扭轉治療」，但將推動成員國採取行動來打擊這類行為。  法新社報導，歐盟執行委員會（Eu...…

items.title: 連漫威男星都燒到？美國人爭相朝聖台灣「這款」飯糰！
items.summary: 飯糰是台灣人最熟悉的台式早餐，最近更有美國美食部落客在加州開箱台式餐廳販售的大飯糰，在台網掀起熱議，各大媒體爭相報導。有部分酸民不以為然，認為所謂「紅到美國」只是「台灣人在自嗨」...…
